ISessionAuthOptionThrowOnFailure Property

One Identity Manager API Server
If this flag is set, an exception during an authentication attempt will be thrown also for FixedCredentials and single-sign-on authentications, instead of continuing trying with the next authentication provider.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Session
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
bool ThrowOnFailure { get; }

Property Value

Type: Boolean

ISessionAuthOption Interface
